column2:
General Requirements to HydraulicUndervoltage1
Failure: HydraulicUndervoltage1
Failure Set and Reset Conditions: 
If Voltage drops below HydraulicSupply Undervoltage_Threshold and vehicle speed is above StandstillThreshold for 1000ms, HydraulicUndervoltage monitorings gets logged.
If vehicle speed is below the Standstill Threshold and if any of the following conditions are fulfilled, then Hydraulic Undervoltage monitoring gets logged:
-- voltage below 9.6V, and if engine is running including Start/Stop ( if Standstill functions supported)
-- voltage below 9.6V, and if engine is off (if APB or Partial braking suppported)

When HydraulicUndervoltage1 monitoring is logged and if the voltage goes above Hydraulic Supply Undervoltage_Threshold + Hysterisis for 500ms, then the monitoring gets healed.
Hydraulic Supply Undervoltage_Threshold:  9.6V
Standstill Threshold: 10kmph

Monitoring: FW_HydraulicUndervoltage1

System strategy:  ESPBase_EbdPumpless, AEB_Off, HHC = Off, TargetStateHBA = Off.
Customer: CHR
Software group: DCOM
Product: IPB
Failure condition          : ECU supply voltage < 9.6V
Operation cycle           : Power cycle
Debouncer Type           : Counter based
DTC_Set_Conditions  : SW is Running.
Failure name                 : FW_HydraulicUndervoltage1
Detection Time             : 1000ms
Recovery Time              : 500ms
Failure type                    : Curable in current Operation Cycle.
DTC                                  : 0x123456
DTC name                      : Hydraulic undervoltage failure
DTC severity                  : Immediately
Warning bit indicator      : True
Node name                     : Node_VoltageHandler1
Parent Node                   : Node_Ecu
Node Priority: 100
Restore to next Operation Cyle: Yes
Curable in current Operation Cycle: No
Import from ASCET: No
Export to ASCET: No
Task cycle: 10ms
